features: Light effective lotion formulated to maintain your skin's natural moisture level
Ideal for facial cleansing, lifting dirt and make-up effortlessly
Cleansing and moisturising all in one bottle
Leaves skin feeling naturally soft and smooth
Use as part of your daily facial care routine
Light moisturising & cleansingNon-greasy for normal skin
description: Product Description NIVEA lotion for normal skin is a light effective lotion that has been specially formulated to help maintain your skin's natural moisture level. Ideal as a cleanser or moisturiser, skin is left feeling soft, smooth and hydrated. Light moisturising care for use on your face or body. This skincare product is dermatologically approved. Noticeably firmer and smoother skin in two weeks: apply the lotion to your whole body daily gently massage it into your skin. Note: Date mentioned on the item is Manufactured date and not the Expiry date Ingredients Aqua, Paraffinum Liquidum, PEG-150, Myristyl Alcohol, Sorbitan Stearate, Cetyl Palmitate, Sorbitan Oleate, Isopropyl Palmitate, Octyldodecanol, Palmitic Acid, Stearic Acid, Lanolin Alcohol (Eucerit), Myristic Acid, Arachidic Acid, Oleic Acid, Sodium Carbomer, Phenoxyethanol, Linalool, Limonene, BHT, Geraniol, Citronellol, Citral, Parfum Safety Warning Please check ingredients if you have sensitivities. Legal Disclaimer As we operate a large high street store, some items may be shop soiled. But all items will be brand new, just the outer packaging may not on some occasions be 100% perfect. Grab a Bargain! Manufacturer's Description A light effective lotion, formulated with a special moisturising agent to maintain your skin's natural moisture level, Nivea Lotion for Normal Skin is quickly absorbed--leaving your skin feeling naturally soft and smooth. It is also ideal for facial cleansing, lifting dirt and make-up effortlessly, providing cleansing and moisturising all in one bottle. Box Contains 1 x Nivea Lotion for normal skin 250 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd., Birmingham, B37 7YS. See more
